spec.description: Loki observability dashboard — storage, ingestion, HTTP, query engine, logs, and profiling.

spec.title: Ingester Streams & Chunks
spec.description: Active in-memory log streams and chunks held by the Loki ingester

spec.title: Chunk Creation Rate
spec.description: Rate of new chunks created by the Loki ingester — Loki equivalent of Prometheus sample ingestion rate

spec.title: WAL Bytes In Use & Records Logged
spec.description: WAL bytes currently in use and rate of WAL records logged — Loki equivalent of Prometheus WAL size & segment

spec.title: Chunk Flushes & Stores
spec.description: Rate of chunks flushed and stored — Loki equivalent of Prometheus TSDB compactions

spec.title: HTTP Request Rate
spec.description: Rate of incoming HTTP requests to Loki broken down by route and status code

spec.title: Query Frontend In Progress & Queue
spec.description: Active queries in the query frontend and queue depth in the query scheduler — Loki equivalent of Prometheus query engine concurrency

spec.title: Request Duration Percentiles
spec.description: P50, P90, and P99 request duration for Loki API routes — Loki equivalent of Prometheus query duration percentiles

spec.title: Query Scheduler Inflight Requests
spec.description: p99 inflight requests in the Loki query scheduler — Loki equivalent of Prometheus query samples rate

spec.title: Loki Logs
spec.description: Live log stream from the Loki instance

spec.title: CPU Profile Rate
spec.description: CPU time consumed by the Loki process over time

spec.title: CPU Flamegraph
spec.description: CPU flamegraph for the Loki process

spec.title: Memory In-Use Profile
spec.description: In-use memory bytes for the Loki process from Pyroscope

spec.title: Memory In-Use Flamegraph
spec.description: In-use memory flamegraph for the Loki process

spec.title: Goroutine Count Profile
spec.description: Active goroutine count over time for the Loki process

spec.title: Goroutines Flamegraph
spec.description: Goroutine stack flamegraph for the Loki process

spec.title: Loki - Home
